name_cn:
『Burberry』
Burberry's exquisite crossbody bag, crafted with grained leather and Vintage check, featuring a logo-engraved snap fastener. Equipped with a detachable strap and adorned with jacquard-woven brand logo. Easily transform into a shoulder bag or clutch. 25 x 8.5 x 18cm, 1208
